description_long: This object is a highly stylized representation of a cannabis (marijuana) leaf, featuring seven elongated, serrated leaflets radiating symmetrically from a central stem. The leaflets are colored in gradients of green with lighter highlights and darker edges, giving a slightly three-dimensional, almost metallic appearance. The object is extremely thin, almost two-dimensional, as seen from the side views, with no visible pot, soil, or root structure. There are no visible decorative elements, containers, or additional plant features such as flowers or buds. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with a hard, rigid structure. This object is best suited as a decorative or symbolic element rather than a functional potted plant.
description: A stylized, flat cannabis leaf with seven pointed, serrated green leaflets and a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full, symmetrical cannabis leaf with all seven leaflets clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the extreme thinness of the object, appearing almost as a single flat plane.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same leaf structure and coloration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the object's flatness and lack of depth.
